meta.title: Le Anh Tuan — Frontend Developer
meta.description: Frontend developer specializing in React, Next.js, performance, and thoughtful digital experiences.
meta.openGraphDescription: React and Next.js engineer building fast, scalable, and usable digital products.

hero.title: Frontend Developer.
hero.lead: Building clear, fast, scalable products with React and Next.js.
hero.caption: Frontend developer · Ha Noi

work.label: Selected work
work.title: Proof lives in the work.
work.intro: Production and academic work, focused on the decisions and outcomes that mattered.

performance.summary: A production performance initiative for a B2B web application, presented without confidential product details.
performance.impact: Combined rendering improvements, code splitting, lazy loading, and responsive component refinements to reduce page-load time by about 10–20%.

4health.summary: A web application for booking and managing clinic services, designed from interface prototype through implementation.
4health.impact: Designed responsive flows in Figma, built a PWA with Blazor WebAssembly, and handled foundational SQL operations for a complete booking journey.

about.label: About & approach
about.title: Simple on the surface. Deliberate underneath.
about.copy: I build production interfaces where usability, performance, and maintainability reinforce each other. I am growing toward full-stack engineering to own more of the product journey.

experience.label: Experience
experience.title: Building, learning, shipping.
experience.intro: From internship recognition to measurable improvements in production.

highlights: Improved page-load performance by approximately 10–20% through Next.js rendering optimization, code splitting, and focused UI refinements.
Integrated RESTful APIs and worked closely with backend engineers to maintain reliable data exchange and system stability.
Contributed to sprint planning and cross-team delivery in an Agile/Scrum environment using Git, Jira, and Trello.
Completed intensive Java Spring Boot training while strengthening HTML, CSS, JavaScript, SQL, and API integration fundamentals.
Built a full-stack mock application with mentors and teammates; recognized as a Top 3 project and Top 3 individual contributor.

credentials.label: Capabilities & credentials
credentials.title: A practical toolkit for digital products.
credentials.intro: Technology is the means. A clear, fast, maintainable product is the outcome.
